display_name: Gemini 3.5 Flash (Stage A structural reviewer and Stage B labeler)
known_cutoff_publicity_caveats: This entry performs the flag-only Stage A structural review and is one of the two independent Stage B outcome-label votes.

Google documents gemini-3.5-flash as a stable model ID rather than a latest or preview alias, but says stable IDs usually do not change and does not guarantee immutable weights or expose a dated snapshot.
A live non-grounded identity probe on 2026-07-12 returned modelVersion gemini-3.5-flash; every official response must return that exact modelVersion or fail closed.
Google reports only a month-level January 2025 knowledge cutoff, so the structured exact-date field remains unknown.
release_timestamp_source: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/changelog, Gemini 3.5 Flash GA release on 2026-05-19, checked 2026-07-12
